evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Label Capture integration from Scandit SDK 7.6 to 8.0. Update the regex-property names in before-8.0-regex.ts.
evals.expected_output: The skill renames pattern→valueRegex, patterns→valueRegexes, dataTypePattern→anchorRegex, dataTypePatterns→anchorRegexes (and the corresponding setter methods) throughout the file; leaves everything else untouched.

assertions.text: setPattern is renamed to setValueRegex
setPatterns is renamed to setValueRegexes
setDataTypePattern is renamed to setAnchorRegex
setDataTypePatterns is renamed to setAnchorRegexes
The old method names (setPattern, setPatterns, setDataTypePattern, setDataTypePatterns) are absent from the final file
Imports and non-regex logic are preserved (ExpiryDateTextBuilder, CustomTextBuilder, CustomBarcodeBuilder, LabelDefinitionBuilder, LabelCaptureSettingsBuilder, Symbology.EAN13UPCA are still used)

evals.prompt: Migrate my Validation Flow from Scandit SDK 8.1 to 8.2 in before-8.2-validation-flow.ts. Adopt the redesigned API.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds the new required onManualInput method to the listener, replaces the deprecated async setters (setRequiredFieldErrorText, setMissingFieldsHintText, setManualInputButtonText) with setPlaceholderTextForLabelDefinition calls, and preserves the existing onValidationFlowLabelCaptured handler.

assertions.text: onManualInput is added to the overlay.listener object with signature (field, oldValue, newValue)
The existing onValidationFlowLabelCaptured handler is preserved
setRequiredFieldErrorText is no longer called in the generated code (deprecated in the redesigned flow)
setMissingFieldsHintText is no longer called
setManualInputButtonText is no longer called
setPlaceholderTextForLabelDefinition is called at least once on validationFlowSettings
LabelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay.withLabelCaptureForView is preserved

evals.prompt: Add the new optional onValidationFlowResultUpdate listener method to my Validation Flow listener in before-8.2-validation-flow.ts. We just upgraded to SDK 8.4 and want to react to partial result updates.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds onValidationFlowResultUpdate(type, fields, frameData) to the listener object, imports LabelResultUpdateType and FrameData, and preserves the existing onManualInput and onValidationFlowLabelCaptured methods.

assertions.text: onValidationFlowResultUpdate is added to the overlay.listener object
The method signature receives (type, fields, frameData) — type is LabelResultUpdateType, fields is LabelField[], frameData is FrameData | null
LabelResultUpdateType is imported from @scandit/web-datacapture-label
FrameData is imported from @scandit/web-datacapture-core
The existing onManualInput listener is preserved
The existing onValidationFlowLabelCaptured listener is preserved

evals.prompt: Rewrite before-8.5-builders.ts to use the new 8.5 ergonomic builder syntax. I'd like the less-verbose form where the name goes in the constructor and there's only a single outer await.
evals.expected_output: The skill moves each field-builder name into the constructor (e.g. new CustomBarcodeBuilder("Barcode")), removes the inner awaits and .build(name) calls, and leaves a single outer .build() + await on LabelCaptureSettingsBuilder.

assertions.text: new CustomBarcodeBuilder("Barcode") (name in constructor) is used
new ExpiryDateTextBuilder("Expiry Date") is used
new TotalPriceTextBuilder("Total Price") is used
new LabelDefinitionBuilder("Perishable Product") is used
There is exactly one await in the expression — on the outer LabelCaptureSettingsBuilder.build() call
No inner .build("...") calls on field builders remain
The field builders are passed directly into addCustomBarcode / addExpiryDateText / addTotalPriceText without await
Symbology.EAN13UPCA is still enabled
